name: Grade 11 Fiber Arts — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 11 pathway for independent research, evaluation, and sophisticated disciplinary communication through Fiber Arts. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 11 knowledge and transferable skills in independent research, evaluation, and sophisticated disciplinary communication through Fiber Arts.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
